-- DROP FUNCTION public.horarioprofessordetalhado(int4, int4, int4, timestamp);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horarioprofessordetalhado(turma integer, professor integer, disciplina integer, data timestamp without time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(horarioprofessor integer, turma integer, identificadorturma character varying, data timestamp without time zone, disciplina integer, professor integer, nraula character varying)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$ 

 SELECT horarioprofessor, turma.codigo as turma, identificadorturma, data, 
	 disciplina.codigo as disciplina,	 
         professor.codigo as professor, 
         split_part(split_part(horario, '[',1), ']',1)::VARCHAR nrAula
 from (
	select horarioprofessor.codigo as horarioprofessor, professor.codigo as professor, horarioprofessordia.data, 
	regexp_split_to_table(horarioprofessordia.horariodisciplinaturma, E';') as horario  from horarioprofessordia     
	inner join horarioprofessor on horarioprofessor.codigo = horarioprofessordia.horarioprofessor
	inner join pessoa as professor on professor.codigo = horarioprofessor.professor
	where case when $2 is null then true else professor.codigo = $2 end = true and case when $4 is null then true else data = $4 end  = true
 ) as horarios 
 inner join disciplina on disciplina.codigo::VARCHAR = split_part(split_part(horario, '[',2), ']',1)::VARCHAR
 inner join turma on turma.codigo::VARCHAR = split_part(split_part(horario, '{',2), '}',1)::VARCHAR
 inner join pessoa as professor on professor.codigo = horarios.professor
 where horarios.horario is not null 
 and case when $3 is null then true else disciplina.codigo = $3 end  = true
 and case when $1 is null then true else turma.codigo = $1 end = true $function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.horarioprofessordetalhado(int4, int4, int4, int4, int4, timestamp, timestamp);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horarioprofessordetalhado(horarioprofessor integer, turno integer, professor integer, disciplina integer, turma integer, datainicio timestamp without time zone, datatermino timestamp without time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(horarioprofessor integer, professor integer, professor_nome character varying, turno integer, turno_nome character varying, horarioprofessordia integer, horariodisciplinaturma character varying, data timestamp without time zone, disciplina integer, disciplina_nome character varying, turma integer, identificadorturma character varying, nraula integer, duracaoaula integer, horarioinicioaula character varying, horariofinalaula character varying, diasemana character varying)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$ 

 SELECT horarioprofessor, horarios.professor, horarios.professor_nome,  horarios.turno, turno_nome, horarios.horarioprofessordia, horarios.horariodisciplinaturma, data, 
	disciplina.codigo as disciplina, disciplina.nome as disciplina_nome, turma.codigo as turma, identificadorturma, 	         
        split_part(split_part(horario, '[',1), ']',1)::VARCHAR::INT nrAula,
        turnohorario.duracaoaula, turnohorario.horarioinicioaula, turnohorario.horariofinalaula, turnohorario.diasemana as diasemana
 from (
	select horarioprofessor.codigo as horarioprofessor, professor.codigo as professor, professor.nome as professor_nome, turno.codigo as turno, turno.nome as turno_nome, horarioprofessordia.data, 
	horarioprofessordia.codigo as horarioprofessordia,  horarioprofessordia.horariodisciplinaturma, 
	regexp_split_to_table(horarioprofessordia.horariodisciplinaturma, E';') as horario  from horarioprofessor     	
	inner join pessoa as professor on professor.codigo = horarioprofessor.professor
	inner join turno on turno.codigo = horarioprofessor.turno
	left join horarioprofessordia on horarioprofessor.codigo = horarioprofessordia.horarioprofessor
	where case when $3 is null then true else professor.codigo = $3 end = true 
	and case when $1 is null then true else horarioprofessor.codigo = $1 end = true 
	and case when $2 is null then true else turno.codigo = $2 end = true 
	and case when $6 is null and $7 is null then true else 
	case when $6 is not null and $7 is null then data = $6 else 
	case when $6 is null and $7 is not null then data = $7 else 
	data >= $6 and data <= $7
	end end end = true	
 ) as horarios
 inner join turnohorario on horarios.turno = turnohorario.turno and turnohorario.numeroaula = split_part(split_part(horario, '[',1), ']',1)::INT  and TO_CHAR(horarios.data, 'D')::INT = turnohorario.diasemana::INT 
 left join disciplina on disciplina.codigo::VARCHAR = split_part(split_part(horario, '[',2), ']',1)::VARCHAR
 left join turma on turma.codigo::VARCHAR = split_part(split_part(horario, '{',2), '}',1)::VARCHAR
 
 where horarios.horario is not null and horarios.horario != ''
 and case when $4 is null then true else disciplina.codigo = $4 end  = true
 and case when $5 is null then true else turma.codigo = $5 end = true $function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.horarioturmadetalhado(int4, int4, int4, timestamp);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horarioturmadetalhado(turma integer, professor integer, disciplina integer, data timestamp without time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(horarioturma integer, turma integer, identificadorturma character varying, data timestamp without time zone, disciplina integer, professor integer, nraula character varying, ocultardataaula boolean)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$ 

	select horarioturma.codigo as horarioturma, turma.codigo as turma, turma.identificadorturma, horarioturmadia.data, 
	disciplina.codigo as disciplina, professor.codigo as professor, horarioturmadiaitem.nraula::VARCHAR as nraula, ocultardataaula  
	from horarioturma     
	inner join turma on turma.codigo = horarioturma.turma   
	inner join horarioturmadia on horarioturma.codigo = horarioturmadia.horarioturma  	
	inner join horarioturmadiaitem on horarioturmadiaitem.horarioturmadia = horarioturmadia.codigo   
	inner join disciplina on disciplina.codigo = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
	inner join horarioprofessordiaitem on horarioprofessordiaitem.horarioturmadiaitem = horarioturmadiaitem.codigo
	inner join horarioprofessordia on horarioprofessordiaitem.horarioprofessordia = horarioprofessordia.codigo
	inner join horarioprofessor on horarioprofessor.codigo = horarioprofessordia.horarioprofessor
	inner join pessoa as professor on professor.codigo =  horarioprofessor.professor
	where case when $1 is null then true else turma.codigo = $1 end = true 
	and case when $4 is null then true else horarioturmadia.data = $4 end  = true
	and case when $3 is null then true else disciplina.codigo = $3 end  = true
	and case when $2 is null then horarioprofessor.professor = horarioturmadiaitem.professor else professor.codigo = $2 end = true 

	$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.horarioturmadetalhado(int4, int4, varchar, varchar, int4, int4, timestamp, timestamp);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horarioturmadetalhado(horarioturma integer, turma integer, ano character varying, semestre character varying, professor integer, disciplina integer, datainicio timestamp without time zone, datatermino timestamp without time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(horarioturma integer, turma integer, identificadorturma character varying, horarioturmadia integer, horarioturmadiaitem integer, data timestamp without time zone, disciplina integer, professor integer, horariodisciplinaprofessor character varying, nraula integer, duracaoaula integer, horarioinicioaula character varying, horariofinalaula character varying, diasemana character varying, turno integer, ocultardataaula boolean, sala integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$ 
	select horarioturma.codigo as horarioturma, turma.codigo as turma, turma.identificadorturma, horarioturmadia.codigo as horarioturmadia, horarioturmadiaitem.codigo as horarioturmadiaitem, 
        horarioturmadia.data, horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina, case when $5 is null then horarioturmadiaitem.professor else horarioprofessor.professor end professor,
	horarioturmadia.horariodisciplinaprofessor, horarioturmadiaitem.nrAula,
	horarioturmadiaitem.duracaoaula, horarioturmadiaitem.horarioinicio as horarioinicioaula, horarioturmadiaitem.horariotermino as horariofinalaula, 
	('0'::VARCHAR(1)||TO_CHAR(horarioturmadia.data, 'D'))::VARCHAR(2) as diasemana, turma.turno, horarioturmadia.ocultardataaula,
	horarioturmadiaitem.sala
	from   horarioturma   	
	inner join turma on turma.codigo = horarioturma.turma  	
	inner join horarioturmadia on horarioturma.codigo = horarioturmadia.horarioturma  
	inner join horarioturmadiaitem on horarioturmadiaitem.horarioturmadia = horarioturmadia.codigo  
	inner join disciplina on disciplina.codigo = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
	inner join horarioprofessordiaitem on horarioprofessordiaitem.horarioturmadiaitem = horarioturmadiaitem.codigo
	inner join horarioprofessordia on horarioprofessordiaitem.horarioprofessordia = horarioprofessordia.codigo
	inner join horarioprofessor on horarioprofessor.codigo = horarioprofessordia.horarioprofessor
    inner join pessoa as professor on professor.codigo = horarioprofessor.professor
	where 
	case when $1 is null then true else horarioturma.codigo = $1 end  = true
	and case when $2 is null then true else turma.codigo = $2 end = true 
	and case when $3 is null then true else anovigente = $3 end = true 
	and case when $4 is null then true else semestrevigente = $4 end = true 	
	and case when $7 is null and $8 is null then true else 
	case when $7 is not null and $8 is null then horarioturmadia.data = $7 else 	
	case when $7 is null and $8 is not null then horarioturmadia.data = $8 else 
	horarioturmadia.data >= $7 and horarioturmadia.data <= $8
	end end end = true	
	and case when $5 is null then horarioprofessor.professor = horarioturmadiaitem.professor else professor.codigo = $5 end = true 
	and case when $6 is null then true else disciplina.codigo = $6 end  = true 
 $function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.horasconsumidaprofessorpormes(date, date, int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horasconsumidaprofessorpormes(data_inicio date, data_fim date, professor integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(mediahorassemanais interval, mediahorassemanaisonline interval, mediahorassemanaispresencial interval, mediahorassemanaisextraclasse interval, mes integer, ano integer, professor integer)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
select avg(horasSemanais) as mediaHorasSemanais,
avg(horasSemanaisOnline) as mediahorasSemanaisOnline,
avg(horasSemanaisPresencial) as mediahorasSemanaisPresencial,
avg(horasSemanaisExtraClasse) as mediahorasSemanaisExtraClasse,
extract(month from dataInicio) as mes,
extract(year from dataInicio) as ano,
professor 
from horasConsumidaProfessorPorSemana(data_inicio, data_fim, professor) as t
group by professor, extract(month from dataInicio), extract(year from dataInicio)
order by professor, ano, mes
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.horasconsumidaprofessorporsemana(date, date, int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.horasconsumidaprofessorporsemana(data_inicio date, data_fim date, professor integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(horassemanais interval, horassemanaisonline interval, horassemanaispresencial interval, horassemanaisextraclasse interval, professor integer, datainicio date, datafim date)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
select 
sum(horasSemanaisOnline+horasSemanaisPresencial+horasSemanaisExtraClasse) as horasSemanais, 
sum(horasSemanaisOnline) as horasSemanaisOnline, 
sum(horasSemanaisPresencial) as horasSemanaisPresencial, 
sum(horasSemanaisExtraClasse) as horasSemanaisExtraClasse, professor, 
dataInicio, dataFim
from (
select (sum(programacaotutoriaonline.horassemanais)*60) * interval '1 minute' as horasSemanaisOnline, interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisPresencial, interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisExtraClasse,  programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.professor, 
semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim
from programacaotutoriaonline
inner join programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor on programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.programacaotutoriaonline  = programacaotutoriaonline.codigo
inner join (SELECT DISTINCT
    date_trunc('week', datas::date)::date  AS dataInicio,
    (date_trunc('week', datas::date) + interval '6 days')::date AS dataFim
FROM
    generate_series(
        $1::date,
        $2::date,
        '7 days'::interval
    ) AS datas
ORDER BY
    dataInicio) as semana on semana.dataInicio is not null
where ((programacaotutoriaonline.definirperiodoaulaonline
and tsrange(programacaotutoriaonline.datainicioaula::date, programacaotutoriaonline.dataterminoaula::date, '[]') && 
tsrange(semana.dataInicio::date, semana.dataFim::date, '[]'))
or (
programacaotutoriaonline.definirperiodoaulaonline = false and (programacaotutoriaonline.ano =  extract(year from semana.dataInicio)::varchar or programacaotutoriaonline.ano = '')
and (programacaotutoriaonline.semestre =  case when extract(month from semana.dataInicio) <= 7 then '1' else '2' end) or programacaotutoriaonline.semestre = '')
)
and programacaotutoriaonline.situacao = 'ATIVO'
and programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.situacaoprogramacaotutoriaonline = 'ATIVO'
and ($3 is null or programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.professor = $3)
group by programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.professor, semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim
union all
select interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisOnline, SUM(horarioprofessordiaitem.duracaoaula) * interval '1 minute' as horasSemanaisPresencial, interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisExtraClasse, horarioprofessor.professor as professor,
semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim
from horarioprofessordiaitem
inner join horarioprofessordia on horarioprofessordia.codigo  =horarioprofessordiaitem.horarioprofessordia
inner join horarioprofessor on horarioprofessordia.horarioprofessor  =horarioprofessor.codigo
inner join (SELECT DISTINCT
    date_trunc('week', datas::date)::date  AS dataInicio,
    (date_trunc('week', datas::date) + interval '6 days')::date AS dataFim
FROM
    generate_series(
        $1::date,
        $2::date,
        '7 days'::interval
    ) AS datas
ORDER BY
    dataInicio) as semana on semana.dataInicio is not null
where horarioprofessordiaitem."data" >= semana.dataInicio
and horarioprofessordiaitem."data" <= semana.dataFim
and ($3 is null or horarioprofessor.professor = $3)
group by  horarioprofessor.professor, semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim 
union all
select interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisOnline, interval '0 minute' horasSemanaisPresencial, (SUM(atividadeextraclasseprofessor.horassemanais) * 60) * interval '1 minute' as horasSemanaisExtraClasse, funcionario.pessoa as professor,
semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim
from atividadeextraclasseprofessor
inner join funcionario on funcionario.codigo = atividadeextraclasseprofessor.funcionario
inner join (SELECT DISTINCT
    date_trunc('week', datas::date)::date  AS dataInicio,
    (date_trunc('week', datas::date) + interval '6 days')::date AS dataFim
FROM
    generate_series(
        $1::date,
        $2::date,
        '7 days'::interval
    ) AS datas
ORDER BY
    dataInicio) as semana on semana.dataInicio is not null
where  tsrange(atividadeextraclasseprofessor.datainicio::date, atividadeextraclasseprofessor.datafim::date, '[]') && 
tsrange(semana.dataInicio::date, semana.dataFim::date, '[]')
and ($3 is null or funcionario.pessoa = $3)
group by  funcionario.pessoa, semana.dataInicio, semana.dataFim
) as t group by professor, dataInicio, dataFim
order by professor, dataInicio, dataFim
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.inserircodigotransmissaonossonumero(int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.inserircodigotransmissaonossonumero(qtdpermitida integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(transmissaonossonumero_codigo integer, anoremessa integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
resultadoBusca RECORD;
transmissaonossonumero_codigo integer;
anoatual integer;
  anoauxiliar integer;
  codtransmissaoanoauxiliar integer;
BEGIN
anoatual := extract(year from now());
while(anoremessa is null) loop
select
case when t.numero >= t.qtdMaxima then null else anoatual end as anoremessa
INTO anoremessa
from( select numero, lpad(cast('' as varchar),qtdPermitida,'9')::bigint as qtdMaxima from transmissaonossonumero where ano = anoatual) as t;

if(anoremessa is null ) then
anoatual := anoatual+1;
if((select numero from transmissaonossonumero where ano = anoatual) is null) then
anoremessa := anoatual;
end if;
END IF;
end loop;

if((select numero from transmissaonossonumero where ano = anoremessa) is null or anoremessa is null ) then
INSERT INTO transmissaonossonumero (numero, ano) values (0, anoremessa);
END IF;
UPDATE transmissaonossonumero set numero = numero+1 where ano = anoremessa;

transmissaonossonumero_codigo = (select numero from transmissaonossonumero where ano = anoremessa);

if exists(select 1 from contapagarcontroleremessacontapagar cpcrp
where cpcrp.transmissaonossonumero = (transmissaonossonumero_codigo::text || substring((anoremessa::text) from 3 for 4)) and contapagar is not null) then
  select  funcao.transmissaonossonumero_codigo, funcao.anoremessa into  codtransmissaoanoauxiliar , anoauxiliar   from  public.inserircodigotransmissaonossonumero(qtdpermitida) as funcao;
  transmissaonossonumero_codigo := codtransmissaoanoauxiliar;
  anoremessa := anoauxiliar;
  codtransmissaoanoauxiliar := null;
  anoauxiliar := null;
 
end if;
return query select transmissaonossonumero_codigo as transmissaonossonumero_codigo, anoremessa as anoremessa;
END
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.inserirdadoscomerciais();

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.inserirdadoscomerciais()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
	BEGIN
	 IF ((NEW.codigo NOT IN (SELECT pessoa FROM dadosComerciais)) AND (NEW.nomeEmpresa != '')) THEN
		INSERT INTO DadosComerciais (pessoa, nomeEmpresa, enderecoEmpresa, cargoPessoaEmpresa, cepEmpresa, complementoEmpresa , cidadeEmpresa, setorEmpresa , telefoneComer, empregoAtual)
		    VALUES (NEW.codigo, NEW.nomeEmpresa, NEW.enderecoEmpresa, NEW.cargoPessoaEmpresa, NEW.cepEmpresa, NEW.complementoEmpresa , NEW.cidadeEmpresa, NEW.setorEmpresa , NEW.telefoneComer, TRUE);
	 END IF;
	 return null;
	END;
	$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumero();

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumero()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
	BEGIN	
	 if((select numero from sequencialnossonumero where ano = extract(year from now())) is null) then
		INSERT INTO sequencialnossonumero (numero, ano) values (0, extract(year from now()));
	 END IF;
	 UPDATE sequencialnossonumero set numero = numero+1 where ano = extract(year from now());	 
	 UPDATE contareceber set sequencialnossonumero = (select numero from sequencialnossonumero where ano = extract(year from now())) where NEW.codigo = contareceber.codigo;	 
	 return null;
	END;
	$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumero(int4, int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumero(codigoconta integer, qtdpermitida integer)
 RETURNS TABLE(sequencialnossonumero_codigo bigint, anoboleto integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
 resultadoBusca RECORD;
 sequencialnossonumero_codigo bigint;
 anoatual integer;
	BEGIN	
	 anoatual := extract(year from now());	 
	 while(anoboleto is null) loop
         select 
         case when t.numero >= t.qtdMaxima then null else anoatual end as anoboleto
             INTO	anoboleto 
         from( select numero, lpad(cast('' as varchar),qtdPermitida,'9')::bigint as qtdMaxima  from sequencialnossonumero where ano = anoatual) as t; 

	 if(anoboleto is null ) then
		anoatual := anoatual+1;
		if((select numero from sequencialnossonumero where ano = anoatual) is null) then
			anoboleto := anoatual;
		end if;		
	 END IF;
	 end loop;
	 
	 if((select numero from sequencialnossonumero where ano = anoboleto) is null or anoboleto is null ) then
		INSERT INTO sequencialnossonumero (numero, ano) values (0, anoboleto);
	 END IF;
	 UPDATE sequencialnossonumero set numero = numero+1 where ano = anoboleto;	 
	 UPDATE contareceber set sequencialnossonumero = (select numero from sequencialnossonumero where ano = anoboleto) where codigoconta = contareceber.codigo;
	 for resultadoBusca in (select sequencialnossonumero from contareceber where codigoconta = contareceber.codigo)	 loop 
	 sequencialnossonumero_codigo := resultadoBusca.sequencialnossonumero;
	 end loop;	
	 return query select sequencialnossonumero_codigo as sequencialnossonumero_codigo, anoboleto as anoboleto;
	END 
	$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumeropagar();

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.inserirnossonumeropagar()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
	BEGIN	
	 UPDATE contapagar set nossonumero = new.codigo where  contapagar.codigo = new.codigo;  	 
	 return new;
	END;
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.is_so_numero(text);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_so_numero(v_texto_recebido text)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 IMMUTABLE
AS $function$
BEGIN
	/*Essa funÃ§Ã£o Ã© usada para validar se o texto passado contÃ©m sÃ³ numero,ele nÃ£o considera nÃºmero negativo/positivo OU nÃºmero decimal .Exemplo -5 ou +2 */
  IF ( (COALESCE(RTRIM(v_texto_recebido),'') = '') OR (v_texto_recebido ILIKE '%.%') ) THEN
    RETURN FALSE;
  ELSE
   RETURN (SELECT v_texto_recebido ~'^([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*|\.[0-9]+)$');
  END IF;
END;
$function$
;
