-- DROP FUNCTION public.tiponiveleducacional();

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.tiponiveleducacional()
 RETURNS TABLE(nameenum text, valor text, descricao text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY  
	(
	SELECT 'INFANTIL' nameenum, 'IN' valor, 'Educação Infantil' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'BASICO' nameenum, 'BA' valor, 'Ensino Fundamental' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'MEDIO' nameenum, 'ME' valor, 'Ensino Médio' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'EXTENSAO' nameenum, 'EX' valor, 'Extensão' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'SEQUENCIAL' nameenum, 'SE' valor, 'Sequencial' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'GRADUACAO_TECNOLOGICA' nameenum, 'GT' valor, 'Graduação Tecnológica' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'SUPERIOR' nameenum, 'SU' valor, 'Graduação' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'POS_GRADUACAO' nameenum, 'PO' valor, 'Pós-graduação' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'MESTRADO' nameenum, 'MT' valor, 'Pós-graduação(Stricto Sensu)' descricao
	UNION
	SELECT 'PROFISSIONALIZANTE' nameenum, 'PR' valor, 'Técnico/Profissionalizante' descricao
	);
END; $function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.turmaprogramada(int4, int4, varchar, varchar, int4, bool, bool);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.turmaprogramada(turma_filtro integer, disciplina_filtro integer, ano_filtro character varying, semestre_filtro character varying, programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor integer, integradaava boolean, integradoplataformaa boolean)
 RETURNS TABLE(turma integer, periodicidade character varying, chave character varying, datainicio date, datatermino date, disciplina integer, ano character varying, semestre character varying, professores character varying)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY (select horarioturma.turma, 
  (case when turma.semestral then 'SEMESTRAL' else case when turma.anual then 'ANUAL' else 'INTEGRAL' end end)::varchar periodicidade,   ('T'||horarioturma.turma||'D'||horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina|| 
		 				(case when turma.semestral then 'A'||horarioturma.anovigente ||'S'||horarioturma.semestrevigente 
		 				else case when turma.anual then 'A'||horarioturma.anovigente  else 'I' end end))::varchar  as chave, 
		 				min(horarioturmadiaitem.data) as dataInicio,
		 				max(horarioturmadiaitem.data) as dataTermino, 
		 				horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina, 
		 				horarioturma.anovigente as ano,
		 				horarioturma.semestrevigente as semestre,
		 				array_to_string(array_agg(distinct horarioturmadiaitem.professor), ',')::varchar as professores
		 				from horarioturma 
		 				inner join turma on turma.codigo = horarioturma.turma
		 				inner join horarioturmadia on  horarioturmadia.horarioturma = horarioturma.codigo
		 				inner join horarioturmadiaitem on  horarioturmadia.codigo = horarioturmadiaitem.horarioturmadia
		 				where ($1 is null or horarioturma.turma = $1 )
		 				and ($2 is null or horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina = $2)
		 				and horarioturma.anovigente  = $3
		 				and horarioturma.semestrevigente = $4		
		 				and ($6 = false or ($6 and exists(select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina where turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and turmadisciplina.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava 		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradedisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradedisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa =  false and  turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava  		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa and turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava )))
		 				and ($7 is null or ($7 and exists(
		 					select horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigo 
		 					from horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada where 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.horarioturma  = horarioturma.codigo and 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
		 					and horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigoplataformaa  is not null
		 				)) or ($7 =  false and not exists(
		 					select horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigo 
		 					from horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada where 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.horarioturma  = horarioturma.codigo and 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
		 					and horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigoplataformaa  is not null
		 				)))
		 				group by horarioturma.turma, horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina, turma.semestral, turma.anual, horarioturma.anovigente, horarioturma.semestrevigente						 				
		 				union all
		 				select  horarioturma.turma, (case when turma.semestral then 'SEMESTRAL' else case when turma.anual then 'ANUAL' else 'INTEGRAL' end end)::varchar periodicidade,  ('T'||horarioturma.turma||'D'||horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina|| 
		 				(case when turma.semestral then 'A'||horarioturma.anovigente ||'S'||horarioturma.semestrevigente 
		 				else case when turma.anual then 'A'||horarioturma.anovigente  else 'I' end end))::varchar  as chave, 
		 				min(horarioturmadiaitem.data) as dataInicio,
		 				max(horarioturmadiaitem.data) as dataTermino, 
		 				horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina, 
		 				horarioturma.anovigente as ano,
		 				horarioturma.semestrevigente as semestre,
		 				array_to_string(array_agg(distinct horarioturmadiaitem.professor), ',')::varchar as professores
		 				from horarioturma 
		 				inner join turma on turma.codigo = horarioturma.turma
		 				inner join turmaagrupada on turmaagrupada.turmaorigem  = horarioturma.turma
		 				inner join horarioturmadia on  horarioturmadia.horarioturma = horarioturma.codigo
		 				inner join horarioturmadiaitem on  horarioturmadia.codigo = horarioturmadiaitem.horarioturmadia
		 				and ($2 is null or  horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina in (
		 					select disciplinaequivalente.equivalente  from disciplinaequivalente where disciplinaequivalente.disciplina  = $2
		 					union all
		 					select disciplinaequivalente.disciplina  from disciplinaequivalente where disciplinaequivalente.equivalente  = $2
		 					union all
		 					select $2
		 				))
		 				where ($1 is null or turmaagrupada.turma = $1 or turmaagrupada.turmaorigem = $1)
		 				and horarioturma.anovigente  = $3
		 				and horarioturma.semestrevigente = $4 		
		 				and ($6 = false or ($6 and exists(select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina where turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and turmadisciplina.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava 		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradedisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradedisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa =  false and  turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava  		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa and turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava )))
		 				and ($7 is null or ($7 and exists(
		 					select horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigo 
		 					from horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada where 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.horarioturma  = horarioturma.codigo and 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
		 					and horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigoplataformaa  is not null
		 				)) or ($7 =  false and not exists(
		 					select horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigo 
		 					from horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada where 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.horarioturma  = horarioturma.codigo and 
		 					horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.disciplina = horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina
		 					and horarioturmadisciplinaprogramada.codigoplataformaa  is not null
		 				)))
		 				group by horarioturma.turma, horarioturmadiaitem.disciplina, turma.semestral, turma.anual, horarioturma.anovigente, horarioturma.semestrevigente		 				
		 				union all 
		 				select turma.codigo as turma, (case when turma.semestral then 'SEMESTRAL' else case when turma.anual then 'ANUAL' else 'INTEGRAL' end end)::varchar periodicidade,   ('T'||turma.codigo||'D'||programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina|| 		
		 				(case when turma.semestral then 'A'||programacaotutoriaonline.ano ||'S'||programacaotutoriaonline.semestre 		
		 				else case when turma.anual then 'A'||programacaotutoriaonline.ano  else 'I' end end))::varchar  as chave, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.datainicioaula as dataInicio,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.dataterminoaula as dataInicio, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.ano  as ano,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.semestre as semestre,
		 				array_to_string(array_agg(distinct programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.professor), ',')::varchar as professores 
		 				from programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor 		
		 				inner join programacaotutoriaonline on programacaotutoriaonline.codigo = programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.programacaotutoriaonline 
		 				inner join turma on programacaotutoriaonline.turma = turma.codigo 		
		 				where (($5 is null and ($2 is null or $2 = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina)) or $5 = programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.codigo)		 				
		 				and ($1 is null or turma.codigo = $1)
		 				and ($3 = programacaotutoriaonline.ano)
		 				and ($4 = programacaotutoriaonline.semestre)
		 				and ($6 =  false or ($6 and exists(select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina where turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and turmadisciplina.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava 		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradedisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradedisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa =  false and  turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava  		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa and turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava )))
		 				and ($7 is null or ($7 and programacaotutoriaonline.codigoplataformaa is not null)
		 					or ($7 = false and programacaotutoriaonline.codigoplataformaa is null))
		 				group by programacaotutoriaonline.datainicioaula ,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.dataterminoaula , 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.ano ,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.semestre,
		 				turma.codigo,turma.semestral , turma.anual
		 				union all
		 				select turma.codigo as turma, (case when turma.semestral then 'SEMESTRAL' else case when turma.anual then 'ANUAL' else 'INTEGRAL' end end)::varchar periodicidade,   ('T'||turma.codigo||'D'||programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina|| 		
		 				(case when turma.semestral then 'A'||programacaotutoriaonline.ano ||'S'||programacaotutoriaonline.semestre 		
		 				else case when turma.anual then 'A'||programacaotutoriaonline.ano  else 'I' end end))::varchar  as chave, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.datainicioaula as dataInicio,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.dataterminoaula as dataInicio, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.ano  as ano,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.semestre as semestre,
		 				array_to_string(array_agg(distinct programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.professor), ',')::varchar as professores 
		 				from programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor 		
		 				inner join programacaotutoriaonline on programacaotutoriaonline.codigo = programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.programacaotutoriaonline 
		 				and programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina in (
		 					select disciplinaequivalente.equivalente  from disciplinaequivalente where disciplinaequivalente.disciplina  = $2
		 					union all
		 					select disciplinaequivalente.disciplina  from disciplinaequivalente where disciplinaequivalente.equivalente  = $2
		 					union all
		 					select $2
		 				)
		 				inner join turmaagrupada on turmaagrupada.turmaorigem = programacaotutoriaonline.turma
		 				inner join turma on turmaagrupada.turma = turma.codigo				 				
		 				where (($5 is null and $2 = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina) or $5 = programacaotutoriaonlineprofessor.codigo)		 				
		 				and ($1 is null or turma.codigo = $1 or turmaagrupada.turmaorigem = $1)
		 				and ($3 = programacaotutoriaonline.ano)
		 				and ($4 = programacaotutoriaonline.semestre)
		 				and ($6 =  false or ($6 and exists(select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina where turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and turmadisciplina.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava 		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradedisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradedisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa =  false and  turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava  		
		 				union select turmadisciplina.codigo from turmadisciplina inner join gradedisciplinacomposta on gradedisciplinacomposta.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina = turmadisciplina.gradecurriculargrupooptativadisciplina where turmadisciplina.disciplinareferenteaumgrupooptativa and turmadisciplina.turma = turma.codigo and gradedisciplinacomposta.disciplina = programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina and turmadisciplina.integrarava )))
		 				and ($7 is null or ($7 and programacaotutoriaonline.codigoplataformaa is not null)
		 					or ($7 = false and programacaotutoriaonline.codigoplataformaa is null))
		 				group by programacaotutoriaonline.datainicioaula ,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.dataterminoaula , 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.disciplina, 
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.ano ,
		 				programacaotutoriaonline.semestre,
		 				turma.codigo,turma.semestral , turma.anual);
		 			
END; 
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.validaalunoassinoucontratomatricula(int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.validaalunoassinoucontratomatricula(codmatriculaperiodo integer)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
begin 
    IF exists(
    select documetacaomatricula.codigo from documetacaomatricula
	inner join tipodocumento on 
	documetacaomatricula.tipodedocumento=tipodocumento.codigo
	inner join matricula on documetacaomatricula.matricula=matricula.matricula
	inner join matriculaperiodo on matriculaperiodo.matricula=matricula.matricula
	where tipodocumento.contrato is true and
	documetacaomatricula.entregue is true
	and matriculaperiodo.codigo = codMatriculaPeriodo
	and exists (select configuracaogeralsistema.codigo from configuracaogeralsistema where configuracaogeralsistema.idautenticacaoservotimize = 'IPOG')
    ) or exists(
    	select matriculaperiodo.codigo from matriculaperiodo
    	inner join matricula on matricula.matricula = matriculaperiodo.matricula
    	inner join unidadeensino on matricula.unidadeensino = unidadeensino.codigo
    	left join configuracaogedorigem on configuracaogedorigem.configuracaoged  = unidadeensino.configuracaoged and configuracaogedorigem.tipoorigemdocumentoassinado = 'CONTRATO'
	 	inner join textopadrao on textopadrao.codigo = matriculaperiodo.contratomatricula 
	 	WHERE (coalesce(textopadrao.assinardigitalmentetextopadrao, false)  is false
	 	or (
	 		coalesce(textopadrao.assinardigitalmentetextopadrao, false)
	 		and (unidadeensino.configuracaoged is null or configuracaogedorigem.codigo is NULL OR coalesce(configuracaogedorigem.assinardocumento, false) is false)
	 	))
	 	and matriculaperiodo.codigo = codMatriculaPeriodo
		and exists (select configuracaogeralsistema.codigo from configuracaogeralsistema where configuracaogeralsistema.idautenticacaoservotimize != 'IPOG')
    ) or exists(
    	select documentoassinado.codigo from  documentoassinado
	 	inner join documentoassinadopessoa on documentoassinado.codigo = documentoassinadopessoa.documentoassinado
	 	WHERE documentoassinado.matriculaperiodo = codMatriculaPeriodo
	 	and documentoassinadopessoa.situacaodocumentoassinadopessoa = 'ASSINADO'
	 	and documentoassinado.tipoorigemdocumentoassinado = 'CONTRATO'	
	 	and documentoassinado.codigo = (
	  		select codigo from documentoassinado where matriculaperiodo = codMatriculaPeriodo order by codigo desc limit 1
	 	)
		and exists (select configuracaogeralsistema.codigo from configuracaogeralsistema where configuracaogeralsistema.idautenticacaoservotimize != 'IPOG')
    )  THEN
       RETURN   TRUE;
    ELSE 
       RETURN false;  
    END IF; 
end;
$function$
;

-- DROP FUNCTION public.validar_contacaixa_aberta(text, int4, int4);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.validar_contacaixa_aberta(sit text, caixa integer, codigo integer)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
 begin
 if $1 = cast('A' as text)  then
   return (select fluxocaixa.codigo from fluxocaixa where contacaixa = $2 and situacao = 'A' and fluxocaixa.codigo != $3 limit 1) is null;
 end if;
 return true;
 end;
 $function$
;

 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE c

AS '$libdir/pg_trgm', $function$word_similarity_op$function$
;
